disable_default_completions.markdownDescription: Set to true to disable default completions.

default: text.html - text.html meta.embedded - text.html meta.interpolation - text.html source - (text.html.markdown - markup.raw.code-fence text.html),
text.html.embedded - text.html.embedded meta.embedded - text.html.embedded meta.interpolation - text.html.embedded source
default_completions_selector.markdownDescription: Controls what scopes default completions will be provided in. Can be a list of strings which are joined before matching.
